title: Office Hours Change - March 25
body:
I will not be available for in person or Zoom office hours on Tuesday, March 25. 
Instead, I will be available via Zoom on Wednesday, March 26 from 5pm-6pm.  You can find the Zoom link on Brightspace.
 
If the Wednesday time does not work for you, please feel free to reach out and we can set up an alternative time.

title: Updated Calendar
body:
Please review the course calendar. I have updated it due to how quickly we are moving through material. It is located in Content and also linked here. The material for the remainder of the semester is listed below.
 
March 25 - Chapter 10
March 27 - Chapter 10
April 1 - Chapter 11
April 3 - Chapter 11
April 8 - Chapter 12
April 10 - Midterm 2 Review
April 15 - Midterm 2 (Chapters 8 - 12)
April 22 - Chapter 13
April 24 - Chapter 13

body:

title: Need a Summer Job...?
body:
Dear Students,
 
I'm reaching out on behalf of the Save It Forward Initiative (SIFI), a student-run nonprofit focused on promoting financial literacy. They are currently looking for business majors to join their team as Content Creators or Social Media Managers this summer. These are unpaid positions, but the experience is highly impactful and resume-worthy.
 
Please see the flyer below for more details!

title: Midterm Exam Grade
body:
Hello Class,

You midterm exam grades have been posted on Brightspace. The class average was 42 out of 55 (76.3%), and the median was 42 out of 55 (76.3%). 

We will review the exam in class next Tuesday. 

Best,
Professor Piha

title: Homework Solutions
body: I have posted the homework solutions through Chapter 8 HW under "Content" then "Homework Solutions." Please use them to check your work and ask me about any discrepancies.
